title: sweech compare gains --json and --per-model
description: sweech compare is ASCII-only and lacks JSON output (inconsistent with other list commands) and per-model breakdown.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 4: "sweech compare gains --json + --per-model"

acceptanceCriteria: --json emits structured comparison (both profiles, scores, plan, status, expiry, costs if known)
--per-model shows per-model rate-limit tiers side by side (e.g. sonnet vs opus quotas)
